form.formComment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, got back early 5th of 10 at Randwick in the G3 Kindergarten on April 4 over 1100m, slow going 2.75 len behind Blue Door carrying 54.5kg at $81. Sure to come on from that run and appeals as one of the major players in this far easier contest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8). Was as a despised roughie at debut, got back early 5th of 10 at Randwick in the G3 Kindergarten on April 4 over 1100m, slow going 2.75 len behind Blue Door carrying 54.5kg at $81. Sure to come on from that run and appeals as one of the major players in this far easier contest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From a wide barrier shifted behind runners in the early stages.

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd of 10 at Newcastle Mdn on March 31 over 900m, 1.5 len behind Lady Catalina with 55.5kg at $9. Should be there at the business end.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). At debut, 2nd of 10 at Newcastle Mdn on March 31 over 900m, 1.5 len behind Lady Catalina with 55.5kg at $9. Should be there at the business end.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Soon after the start bumped by Laime.

form.formComment: Filly by Capitalist making her first appearance. Won a Rosehill trial over 900m on April 2. Looks to have her share of talent.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Capitalist making her first appearance. Won a Rosehill trial over 900m on April 2. Looks to have her share of talent.

form.formComment: First starter by Street Boss filly from the Chris Waller yard. Finished fifth in a Rosehill trial over 900m on April 2. Others favoured today.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Street Boss filly from the Chris Waller yard. Finished fifth in a Rosehill trial over 900m on April 2. Others favoured today.

form.formComment: Filly by Russian Revolution on debut. Trialled on March 24 at Beaumont (Newcastle) over 850m and finished fifth. Facing a stiff test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Russian Revolution on debut. Trialled on March 24 at Beaumont (Newcastle) over 850m and finished fifth. Facing a stiff test.

form.formComment: At debut, raced on the pace when 3rd of 7 at Randwick Kensington 2yo F Osc on March 25 over 1100m, slow going 5.5 len behind Reachin' Out with 56kg at $21. Can build on that effort and give this a shake.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). At debut, raced on the pace when 3rd of 7 at Randwick Kensington 2yo F Osc on March 25 over 1100m, slow going 5.5 len behind Reachin' Out with 56kg at $21. Can build on that effort and give this a shake.

form.formComment: Filly by Wootton Bassett facing the starter for the first time. Won a Warwick Farm trial over 821m on March 30. Nicely bred and can run a big race without surprising.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Wootton Bassett facing the starter for the first time. Won a Warwick Farm trial over 821m on March 30. Nicely bred and can run a big race without surprising.

form.formComment: Two-year-old filly (Maurice - April Rain) has trialled on three occasions leading into today's race. Was second in a Rosehill barrier trial over 1030m April 2. Cannot be underestimated.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old filly (Maurice - April Rain) has trialled on three occasions leading into today's race. Was second in a Rosehill barrier trial over 1030m April 2. Cannot be underestimated.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at Rosehill 2yo Hcp November 29 over 1100m, 6 len behind Fireball with 55kg at $71. On debut ninth of 11 at Newcastle Max Lees November 15 over 900m, 6 len behind Seeiaye with 54.5kg at $101. No chance on what we saw last prep.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Resuming. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at Rosehill 2yo Hcp November 29 over 1100m, 6 len behind Fireball with 55kg at $71. On debut ninth of 11 at Newcastle Max Lees November 15 over 900m, 6 len behind Seeiaye with 54.5kg at $101. No chance on what we saw last prep.
